name.description: New player app name. Must start with player-.
name.x-prompt: What player app name would you like to use?

force.description: Replace the target app if it already exists.

port.description: Optional explicit dev/preview port in the 4200-4299 range.

noStatusPage.description: Remove the demo StatusPage component from the generated app.

tags.description: Optional comma-separated Nx tags to apply to the generated app.
